title: Lululemon takes battle with Chip Wilson public, calls founder 'misguided' and 'outdated'
summary_full: Lululemon responded publicly to founder Chip Wilson's campaign in a letter to shareholders, where it urged them to vote in its favor at its annual meeting.
summary_public: Lululemon responded publicly to founder Chip Wilson's campaign in a letter to shareholders, where it urged them to vote in its favor at its annual meeting.
